name: token-burningman
description: Token usage analytics for Claude Code with TUI, statusline, MCP, and opt-in community reporting. Local-first. Privacy-safe.

interface.shortDescription: Claude Code usage analytics with native summaries and full TUI drill-down.
interface.longDescription: Track Claude Code token usage locally, view native dashboards through MCP, keep a full Ink TUI for deep inspection, and optionally submit anonymized hourly community reports.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my Claude Code usage today.
Show the projects that cost me the most this month.
